T£T. ^ ^ T 3 H-iVRd 3R3t "I I [TO U 11/1 l / 2 0 0 7 - ^ ' S ^ i ^ t ] feujuD : W f a * f a *RJ +<r*l|U| ^ ^F ^ l < H W f l " ^ 3 ^ S l f t ^ n W l ^FISTT. 918(31), fcTPP 12 3FR?T, 2004, ^T. 3TT. 24(3T)f -M^5^F^Rt,2005^Tr^T.3TT. 667(31), forfa 9 fff, 2006 ^ ^R?T ^TTST^T ^f y+lfVlcl %^T •^RTT « n I MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th November, 2007 S.0.2005(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (2) read with Sub-section (1) of Section 5A of Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Animal Welfare Board of India consisting of the following persons as its Members, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, namely:— 1. Director General of Forests, Ministry of Environment and Forests, Member (ex-officio) under Section 5(l)(a) New Delhi 2 The Animal Husbandry Commissioner, Ministry of Agriculture, Member (ex-officio) under Section 5(l)(b) New Delhi 3. The Director, Wildlife Institue of India, Dehradun Member under Section 5(l)(bb) 4. Maj. Gen. (Retd.) Dr. R. M. Kharb, AVSM, Member under Section 5(l)(bc) 23, Munirka Vihar, New Delhi-67 5. Shri Hiranmay Karlekar, Journalist, E-54, Sujan Singh Park, Member under Section 5( 1 )(bc) New Delhi -- 2 of 3 -- [mu—^^3(ii)i *m^Tirm: awranui 6. Ms. Norma Alvares, Advocate, G-8, St. Britto's Apartments, Feira Alta, Mapusa-403 507 (Goa) 7. Dr. V. N. Appaji'Rao, 1/L, Mandira Apartments, New No. 53, North Boag Road, T. Nagar, Chennai-600 017 8. Dr. Md. Saleem Aslam, 162/4A, Thiruvalluvar Salai, Thiruvanmi:^ur, Chennai-600 041 9. Dr. Brahamchari, Omswaroopparya—Ayurvaid, Gurukul Gaushala Bikadala, Panipat, Haryana 10. The Representative of Municipal Corporation of Shimla, Himachal Pradesh 11. The Representative of Municipal Corporation of Delhi, New Delhi 12. Shri Guljari Lai Soni, Representative of Rajasthan, Pinjrapole Fatehpur, Rajasthan 13. Shri Vadilal Kamdar, Representative of Shree Mandal Mahajan Pinjrapole, Gujarat 14. Smt. Amala Akkineni, Representative of Blue Cross of Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh Member under Section 5(l)(bc) Member under Section 5(l)(c) Member under Section 5(l)(d) Member under Section 5(1 )(d) Member under Section 5(1 )(e) Member under Section 5(1 )(e) Member under Section 5(1 )(f) Member under Section 5(l)(f) Member under Section 5(1X1) Member under Section 5(l)(g) Member under Section 5(1 )(g) 15. Lt. Col (Retd.) Dr. J. C. Khanna, Representative of SPCA, Bombay, Dr. S. S. Rao Road, Parel, Mumbai-400012, Maharashtra 16. Dr. Amaresh Chatterjee, Representative of Assam State, SPCA Guwahati, No. 4/2-A, Leonard Road, Hastings, Kolkata-700 022, West Bengal 17. Shri Shailaja Kant Misra, IPS, Additional Director General of Police, UP Police Inter State Border Force, 1, Vineet Khand, Gomti Nagar, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh 18. Shri Mahendra Kumar Bum, 47, Kavi Kalidas Path, Badnagar-456 771, District Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh 19. Shri Rajeev Gupta, Principal Resident Commissioner, Government of Uttarakhand, 104, Indra Prakash Building, 21, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi-110001 The Central Government hereby nominates Maj, General (Retd.) Dr. R. M. Kharb, AVSM, Member to be the Chairman and Dr. V. N, Appaji Rao, Member to be the Vice Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India as per Sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act. [F. No. 11/11/2007-AWD] G. BALACHANDHRAN, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notifications regarding reconstitution of the Animal Welfare Board of India were published in the Gazette of India vkle number S.0.918(E) dated the 12th August, 2004, S.0,24(E) dated the 5th January, 2005 and S.0.667(E) dated the 9th May, 2006.
